name: txsentinel-okx
description: A deterministic transaction policy firewall for autonomous agents, built on OKX OnchainOS and x402.

scripts.test: npm run browser:build && npm run contract:compile && node --test
scripts.check: npm run browser:build && node --check api/check.js && node --check api/check-paid.js && node --check api/health.js && node --check lib/policy.js && node --check public/site.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/onchain.js && node --check public/integrate.js && node --check public/x402-browser.js && node --check scripts/compile-contract.mjs && node --check scripts/record-demo.mjs && npm run contract:lint
